task: move blue plastic bottle near green jalapeno chip bag
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A clear plastic bottle with a white cap sits on a gray table. A green bag is to the left of the bottle, and a black object (likely a phone) is to the right. The bottle is rigid and has a cap. The task is to move the bottle, which requires grasping it and transporting it to a new position. **STRATEGY -** First, reach for the bottle, grasp it by its body for stability, then transport it to the right side of the table near the black object. Ensure the bottle is placed securely without tipping. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach for the bottle body to establish contact. Step 2: Grasp the bottle body to lift it. Step 3: Transport the bottle to the right side of the table. Step 4: Place the bottle on the table surface near the black object.

Goal: on(bottle, table); stable(bottle)
Scene: bottle, green_bag, black_object, table
Step 1: reach(bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bottle
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, bottle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, bottle) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bottle
  contact: holding(bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(bottle)
Step 3: transport(bottle -> right_side_of_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the right side of the table
  spatial: above(bottle, right_side_of_table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(bottle)
  done_when: above(bottle, right_side_of_table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(bottle -> right_side_of_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the right side of the table
  contact: surface_contact(bottle, right_side_of_table) [completion]; released(bottle) [completion]
  pose: stable(bottle) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(bottle, right_side_of_table) AND released(bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bottle
the body of the clear plastic bottle
an empty area on the right side of the table
an empty area on the right side of the table
